projects.Title: Reed College Maintenance Hole Rehab
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Sewer bypass design
Maintenance hole design
Permitting
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant providing civil engineering services for this maintenance hole rehabilitation project. The maintenance hole, located in a sensitive natural area on the Reed College campus and adjacent to Crystal Springs, had eroded away resulting in water shooting out from the bottom. Several attempts at sealing the holes failed, so the decision was made to plug, line, and abandon the existing hole and replace it with a new hole outside of the natural area. Emerio’s tasks included abandoning the existing hole by filling with CSLM and lining it, designing for temporary sewer bypass, construction of the new hole downstream, and managing the complex permitting process. Construction is complete.

projects.Title: Capitol Highway Stormwater Improvements
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Legal descriptions
Topographic survey and basemapping
Retaining walls
Stormwater facilities
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided survey and structural services for this joint BES and PBOT project to improve transportation and stormwater facilities along SW Capitol Hwy. Scope included topographic survey and basemapping, legal descriptions, new stormwater system improvements at multiple locations along the corridor, and retaining wall design. Project is currently under construction.

projects.Title: Marquis Eugene Senior Living
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading
Storm sewer design
Domestic fire and water service
Parking lot
Stormwater raingardens/planters
Retaining walls
3D survey mapping
Boundary and topographic survey
Construction staking
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio surveyed, designed, and managed this multi-building and multi-phased development with 76 senior housing units as well as an assisted-living and memory care center on a 12-acre vacant lot in Eugene, OR. This 4-phased project includes a 3-story, 99,000 sq ft assisted-living and memory care building; 44 independent living townhouses for seniors; 30 duplex cottage units; and a community center with a gym, pool, cafe, and other site amenities. Site improvements consisted of relocation of existing site access to 2 commercial driveways and design of private infrastructure including grading, storm, sewer, domestic fire and water service, parking lot, stormwater raingardens/planters, and retaining wall. Survey scope included full boundary and topographic survey, providing record information for the design of the site, and construction staking. Additionally, Emerio’s survey design staff provided 3D mapping for machine control used by the contractor on site.

projects.Title: Cedar Commons
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Utility design
Stormwater design
Erosion control plans
Site grading and drainage
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering services for this 3-story, 60-unit apartment complex on a largely vacant 1-acre parcel. The building consists of 40 single room occupancy units and 20 studio units targeted to people exiting homelessness. The site includes a 22-space parking lot, courtyard, landscaped facilities, bike parking, and two drywells for stormwater runoff. The site also has offices for counseling, group kitchens on each floor, community space, and laundry. Central City Concern is providing intensive on-site wraparound services for the residents, including crisis prevention, mental health services, and employment support.

projects.Title: Pruner Rd/Industrial Way Traffic Control
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Topographic survey and basemap
Utility location
ROW resolution
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided survey services for this intersection improvement project. Tasks included topographic survey and basemap preparation, utility location, and ROW resolution.

projects.Title: Portland Japanese Garden
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Boundary resolution
Topographic and as-built surveys
Utility location
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing surveying services for this 12-acre garden in the forested hills of SW Portland, helping create a comprehensive site map that will help facilitate the planning and communication necessary to effectively support the continued growth, changes, and challenges inherent in maintaining the space.

projects.Title: Cedar Hills Topo Survey
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Topographic survey
ROW location
Utility location
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is performing surveying services for this infiltration and inflow sewer rehabilitation project for an approx. 30 acre subdivision in Beaverton. With the goal of locating existing sewer mains and sewer lateral connections and elevations, Emerio’s scope includes topographical survey and base map of project right-of-way and location of building corners, low points on buildings, and utilities.

projects.Title: I-205: Stafford Road to OR99E Corridor Road Widening
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Survey Control Network
Topographic survey & mapping
DTM
ROW resolution
projects.DESCRIPTION: Subconsultant providing topographic and base map survey on this project to widen I-205 to three northbound and three southbound through lanes from the Stafford Road Interchange on the south to OR213 on the north.

projects.Title: NE Alberta St: 14th – 30th Ave
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Survey Control Network
Topographic Survey
Boundary Line and Parcel Surveys
Metes and Bounds/Easement/ROW/Legal Descriptions
projects.DESCRIPTION: As prime consultant, Emerio provided topographic and 3D mapping survey for this on-call paving project on NE Alberta Street from the intersections of 14th Ave to 30th Ave. Safety improvements also include updating corners that do not meet current ADA standards.

projects.Title: Springwater Connector
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Analysis, planning, and concept design
Cost estimating
Street geometry & ROW
Ped/Bike/ADA
Street drainage
Traffic control
Erosion control
projects.DESCRIPTION: As prime consultant, Emerio provided engineering services for this multimodal safety project. Mike led the multi-discipline to provide improved bicycle and pedestrian access, greenway improvements, and connections to the nearby Springwater Corridor trail. Safety improvements included: • Dedicated mid-block crossing • Safety enhancements compliant with ADA and AASHTO standards • Bike and pedestrian access during construction (TPAR) • Extended continuous sidewalk in designated locations • Creative stormwater solutions

projects.Title: Region 2 Bridge Screening
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
PS&E development
Structural design for fence mounting
Staging, traffic control, & TMP
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant for this project to install protective screening on five highway overpasses in Region 2 to improve safety for motorists by preventing objects being thrown from above and to bring the bridges into compliance.

projects.Title: OR22: Joseph St. – Golf Club Rd.
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
PS&E development
Highway design
Utility & railroad coordination
Traffic control plans and TPAR design
Coordinate utilities
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant for this pavement rehab project in Region 2 to improve pavement conditions, pavement ride, and durable striping along 7 miles of OR22. Emerio provided highway design, PS&E development, utility coordination, and traffic control plans, as well as managed subconsultants to handle the structures and railroad coordination.

projects.Title: ADA Safety Improvements
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Manage bid & award
Oversee contractor compliance
Manage changes, claims, & protests
Prepare contractor payments
Maintain documents
Coordinate utilities
Review & recommend changes to design plan
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing construction management services for this project to bring existing ADA curb ramps across Portland into compliance. Emerio’s staff is responsible for performing constructability and traffic control reviews, managing the City’s inspectors, reviewing field work, providing field support, and resolving issues as needed. We are also addressing contract change orders, coordinating with other City departments, issuing punch list, and closing out the project by issuing payment and completion letter.

projects.Title: Construction Inspection Support
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Oversee contractor compliance
Manage changes
Maintain documents
Review and recommend changes to design plan
projects.DESCRIPTION:
Emerio provided construction inspection support for the City of Eugene’s summer construction season. Projects included:

Safe Routes to School Project - Safety upgrade project which includes construction of ADA curb ramps, installation of flashing beacons, street lighting, new traffic signal, and ACP paving. Emerio provided daily inspection, quantities verification, material quality certification, and approval of contractor’s deliverables.

Amazon Park Running Trail Renovation - Trail improvement project which includes updated trail lighting within sensitive habitat areas. Emerio provided daily inspection, quantities verification, material quality certification, and approval of contractor’s deliverables.

projects.Title: SE Lambert Duplex
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Site layout
projects.DESCRIPTION: New construction of modern duplex condos in Sellwood neighborhood. Approximately 2,500 ft2 with 4 bed and 4 bath each, including separate living quarters. Photo permission granted by Keller Williams.

projects.Title: OSU Parking Maintenance and Repair Design
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Cost estimates
Constructability reviews
Construction management and inspection
Bidding assistance
Demolition and repair plan documents
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant providing design and construction support services for this project to remove and replace deficient asphalt in four parking lots on OSU's campus.

projects.Title: William Walker Elementary School
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Public frontage improvements
Construction inspection
Stormwater treatment facilities
Construction documents to include Plans, Specs & Estimates
Surveying and easements
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided site civil design and construction inspection to support DLR Group, the lead architect, for this redevelopment project. Construction was completed in 2019 and replaced the current facility with a modern, 87,200 sq.ft., two-story building that holds 750 students.

projects.Title: Balch Creek Trash Rack Retrofit
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Permitting with local, state, and federal agencies
Construction documents to include Plans, Specs & Estimates
Utility coordination
Trail realignment
Foundation, grading, and ADA accessible sidewalk design
projects.DESCRIPTION: As the prime consultant, Emerio is providing project management and civil design services for this in-stream restoration project that is a key feature of Portland Parks & Recreation’s Macleay Park. The existing trash racks and bays keep the majority of sediment, rock, and floating debris from entering the low-pressure storm sewer that conveys Balch Creek from Forest Park to the Willamette River.

projects.Title: Enhanced Transit Corridors
projects.OWNER: TriMet and Portland Bureau of Transportation
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED: Conceptual planning
projects.DESCRIPTION: TriMet and Portland Bureau of Transportation have developed the Enhanced Transit Corridors (ETC) Plan which aims to make travel by buses faster and more reliable. Several sites around the Portland-metro area have been identified for improvement, including the Burnside, Capitol Hwy, and Hillsboro corridors. Emerio is a subconsultant to Jacobs participating in the conceptual planning of these sites. . Rafael Gaeta, PE, and Ben Ullmann, PE are leading Emerio's consultant team and recently shared their thoughts on this exciting project. Read more >>

projects.Title: Spring Garden Park
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site utility plan
Grading
Construction documents
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio joined the project team as a subconsultant for the re-development of this approximate 4.65-acre park in SW Portland. Emerio’s role was to provide design services for a site utility plan including sanitary sewer and water services for the restroom facility, water feature and drinking fountains.

projects.Title: Columbia Blvd Wastewater Treatment Plant Secondary Treatment Expansion (STEP)
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site analysis and layout
Site piping, grading, and drainage
Erosion control
Horizontal and vertical control network
Basemapping
Topographic survey
Tunnel scanning
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio is providing engineering and surveying services for this project to add two secondary treatment clarifiers and repurpose the site of existing facilities for expansion to increase capacity and prevent unnecessary overburden of the treatment plant. Emerio is providing full topographic survey and tunnel scanning and civil design for both process & non-process facilities.

projects.Title: PBOT Tunnel Illumination Upgrades
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Utility coordination
Traffic control plans
3D scanning and survey
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided survey services to support the tunnel illumination upgrades for four tunnels including: Rocky Butte Tunnel, Burnside Tunnel, Cornell Tunnels, and Naito Parkway Tunnel. Survey was conducted at each tunnel to identify tunnel portal heights, high points near the center of the tunnel and elevation of the tunnel walls at the curb line. Existing utilities were also located and surveyed between the tunnel portals and electrical service locations to minimize any conflicts.

projects.Title: Providence Park Settlement Monitoring
projects.OWNER: City of Portland Office of Management & Finance
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Land surveying and monitoring
Set control points
Establish a control network
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing surveying services at Providence Park, setting monitoring and reference points in the stadium tied to City of Portland benchmarks and datum. Beginning prior to and continuing during recent construction, this monitoring holds to the strict standards of the construction industry and the City of Portland’s quality assurance programs.

projects.Title: PBOT ADA Curb Ramp Replacement Program
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA inventory, assessment, and design
Construction support
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is a subconsultant on two projects for PBOT. These projects include the inventory, assessment, and/or design of over 1,000 ADA curb ramps over the next five years. Many of the ramps will be designed utilizing PBOT’s streamlined design methods which consist of “in-the-field layout and design” for pre-selected areas that qualify.

projects.Title: Penske Coburg
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading design
Erosion control design
Stormwater/wastewater/potable water design
Parking lot and sidewalk design
Full street improvement
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio Design was the civil engineering consultant providing site civil design and construction engineering support for this new construction on a vacant 3.63-acre site. The facility offers full-service truck leasing, truck rental, fleet maintenance, in the 13,220 square-feet building with three truck bays, one wash bay, and a two-lane fuel island. Emerio successfully delivered onsite construction drawings and approvals for grading, erosion control, stormwater, wastewater, potable water, parking lot, sidewalks and street connection improvements.

projects.Title: Brooktree Estates
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Site Layout
projects.DESCRIPTION: Award-winning new single family home design, featuring five unique floor plans; varying square footage and front elevations; and vaulted ceilings.

projects.Title: Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway Safety Demonstration Project
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Street design
Pedestrian crossing design
ADA curb ramp design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant for this PBOT roadway design project to provide safety improvements on Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway between SW 30th and 35th Avenues. An identified high crash corridor, this section of highway has a high pedestrian crash rate and high rate of speeding. As part of PBOT's Fixing our Streets program, Emerio was responsible for design of a new marked pedestrian crossing with a median island and Rapid Flashing Beacons at 35th Avenue, a protected pedestrian/bike lane space, reduced travel lane widths, and ADA-compliant pedestrian curb ramps.

projects.Title: SW Palentine
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: New construction with contemporary tree-house house design perched in the woods tucked away off I-5 in Portland. It was built as spec house for an investment company, and sold immediately, featuring clean lines and energy efficient home.

projects.Title: ADA Design & Support Services
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Surveying
ADA training
ADA ramps inventorying
projects.DESCRIPTION: In support of ODOT’s mission to address compliance with the American with Disabilities Act (ADA) throughout Oregon, Emerio has been providing surveying and staff for training and inventorying services. Two of our technical staff have been trained by ODOT in ADA design standards and have been training other ODOT, consultant and contractor technical staff, as well as inventorying ADA ramps around Oregon. Once their contract is completed at the end of 2017, they will provide in-house expertise of ADA design, review, and staff training. In addition, Emerio has provided surveying at mulitple locations around the state.

projects.Title: Colwood Golf Course
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Parking lot design
Sidewalk and ADA design
On site stormwater management
Utility design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant for this re-development project, providing site civil design and PS&E construction documents for civil improvements. The project scope included reconfiguration of existing parking lot, sidewalk improvements, stormwater management and a sanitary sewer extension. Parking lot improvements included reconfiguring the existing lot to current development standards and grading it to drain an acre of inflow area to a water quality facility, eventually leading to 2,300 ft2 LIDA settling and detention pond. A sewer extension was designed, decommissioning the existing septic system and tying into the public sewer line.

projects.Title: N. Terry
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Land use planning
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: Three houses on residential infill lots with traditional Portland design, tuck under garages and spacious front porches.

projects.Title: I-205: Glenn Jackson Bridge to Johnson Creek, Phase 2
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Civil design at ATM sites
PS&E documents from Draft DAP through construction documents
Design exception requests
Construction feasibility review
Coordination of structural components
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio is providing engineering and design services for 14 sites where Active Traffic Management (ATM) signs and structures will be added along I-205 from the Glenn Jackson Bridge to Johnson Creek Blvd. The project will also add auxiliary lanes in the northbound direction.

projects.Title: Powell LIFT Operations Facility Relocation
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Civil design
Constructability reviews
Construction support
Parking lot design
Hydraulic analysis
Project Management
Stormwater facility analysis and design
Structural design of retaining wall
Waterline design
projects.DESCRIPTION: As the prime consultant, Emerio provided project management and civil engineering services for a team of nine consulting engineering and architecture firms for this full-service, site improvement, and re-purposing project. The Emerio team provided the design for the parking lot and access road reconfiguration; stormwater facilities; sewer, water, power and communications connections; and a retaining wall. Due to the future expansion of the Powell Garage facility, TriMet has chosen to reconfigure the Powell Park and Ride site to accommodate its LIFT para-transit operation, as part of the phased larger Division BRT project. With the exception of 85 spaces at the existing Park and Ride site, the remainder of the property is being reconfigured for LIFT vehicle storage, employee parking, a new 7,000ft2 building, and a smaller wash building.

projects.Title: Portland to Milwaukie Light Rail: East Segment
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Demolition plan & utility relocates
Retaining wall design
Sidewalk design and pedestrian facilities
Signage and striping plan
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio was responsible for roadside and sidewalk improvements and wall design along two sections of the East Segment of the Portland to Milwaukie Light Rail Expansion. Emerio provided designs for roadside improvements along a ¼-mile section of McLoughlin Blvd. in Milwaukie; structural design for multiple retaining walls; and sidewalk improvements on the north side of SE Powell Boulevard from the rail over pass to SE 20th Avenue.

projects.Title: NE 32nd Ave
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: New construction on infill lot in Portland, featuring attached units and modern design with clean lines and spacious floor plan.

projects.Title: NE 18th Ave
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: Spacious four-square design, with tuck under garage on infill lot in Portland

projects.Title: Large Scale Sewer Rehabilitation
projects.OWNER: BES (Emerio was subconsultant to multiple prime consultants)
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Small diameter sanitary sewer design
AutoCAD/Civil 3D support
Survey
Assisted in land use and construction approvals
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided utility design, CAD and survey services on five separate projects within this program, with the objective to increase sewer capacity and reduce the risks of street flooding and sewage releases to homes, businesses and streets. Emerio’s design services included first assessment of pipe conditions; alternatives analysis for rehabilitation method of pipes; and then small diameter pipe design for the preferred method. In regard to CAD support, Emerio was responsible for plan and profile sheets, identifying revised sewer alignments, spot repair locations, and pipe rehabilitation/replacement. Emerio’s survey responsibilities included locating ROW areas; topographic survey used for design of new sewer lines and sewer line upgrades; conducting field investigations; verifying preferred rehabilitation methods, and utility as-built surveys. Existing conditions maps were produced in AutoCAD by adhering to the agency's standards and by requesting sample CAD files to verify compliance with drafting standards.

projects.Title: PACR: PDX Parking Additions and Consolidated Rental Car Facility
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading and erosion control
Parking lot design
Sanitary and storm sewer collection system design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing civil design services as part of the design team for this progressive design-build delivery for the new Long Term Parking and Consolidated Rental Car facility at PDX. Adjacent to the 1.6 million ft2 long term parking and rental car operations center and new customer service space, our design team is responsible to retrofit the employee parking lot.

projects.Title: Wheeler Basin
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA curb ramp design
Small diameter sanitary sewer conveyance design
Stormwater infiltration design
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided design and bid support for this capacity upgrades project by upsizing pipes and adding surface infiltration facilities. Emerio was responsible for conducting pre-design and alternatives analysis, and final design for stormwater, utility and ADA improvments. Emerio’s scope included "greenstreet" design of six raingardens within the public right of way; design of 2,000 lf extension of combination sanitary and stormwater sewer pipe; and design of five new ADA ramps.

projects.Title: North Borthwick
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: New construction of traditional style home with modern colors and clean lines.

projects.Title: Barcelona and LaScala Apartments
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site civil design
Grading and erosion control design
Utility design
Sidewalk design
Survey
projects.DESCRIPTION: This approximately 54,000 sq ft property included surveying, site design, engineering, and construction management support for these two, mixed use buildings, the City of Beaverton’s first of it’s kind in affordable housing in downtown Beaverton. Each building has four floors and 5,000 square feet of commercial space on the ground floor and will provide a total of 91 living units for working residents. Emerio’s responsibility was to provide design plans for site development, grading and erosion control, and wet utilities. Cost estimating services were included for water, sewer, storm, grading and frontage improvements. Additional services included as-built drawings and construction support services, providing essential communication with the developer, primary contractor and subs, in order to meet critical deadlines and budget.

projects.Title: SE/NE 122nd Avenue and Foster Road Safety Improvements
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Sidewalk Infill
Enhanced pedestrian crossing
ADA ramp retrofit
Stormwater management
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio developed two separate PS&E design packages from PBOT’s preliminary engineering plans. The objective along multiple sections of these heavily traveled commercial corridors was to engineer pedestrian safety improvements and to improve accessibility to transit by providing pedestrian crossings with ADA ramps and sidewalk infill. Along the SE/NE 122nd Avenue corridor, Emerio was responsible for grading, paving, striping, and signing for two Rectangular Rapid Flash Beacon (RRFB) crossings and one HAWK crossing (High Intensity Activated Crosswalk Beacon). Along SE Foster Road, a new sidewalk corridor was added, closing the gap in the existing sidewalk to improve accessibility. Stormwater improvements included catch basins and storm pipes resulting from revised geometry of the curb and gutter.

projects.Title: City Fleet Fuel Station Replacement
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading and erosion control
Stormwater analysis and design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing civil design services at two fueling stations owned by the City of Portland (Interstate Ave and Columbia Wastewater Treatment Plant) to upgrade the current fuel facilities to be seismically resilient.

projects.Title: West Edge
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Civil engineering
House design
Structural design
Land Use Planning
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: 20-lot subdivision of modern and contemporary 2-3 story homes, with attached garages, conveniently located in the heart of Beaverton.

projects.Title: Broadway Bridge Painting
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED: Temporary traffic control design
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided temporary traffic control plans for this bridge closure due to needed deck repairs and painting. The painting schedule was 70 days, making traffic flows and changing patterns for each section of the work a critical component of the project. Traffic flow was merged into two lanes during the painting project. Close coordination was required with PBOT to place signs along travel corridors east and west of the river, and ODOT as well, since signage was required on I-5 ramps.

projects.Title: King + Parks Apartments
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site civil design
On and off-site utility design
Sanitary sewer, water, and drainage design
Erosion control plans
Construction cost estimating
Utility relocation and coordination
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering services on this project led in partnership by Colas Construction and Merryman and Barnes Architects. In 2016, the Portland Housing Bureau selected Portland Community Reinvestment Initiatives, Inc. (PCRI) as the developer for this affordable housing project in close proximity to transit, shopping and social services. The vacant lot was developed into one building with a “U”-shaped internal courtyard providing housing for residents who have been displaced or at risk of displacement from N/NE Portland.

projects.Title: SW Sunrise Ln
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
House design
Structural design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: Custom home for client in suburban environment with new construction on sloping topography.

projects.Title: Division Transit Corridor
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading
Roadway, sidewalk, and ADA design
Site layout
Surveying
Utility design and coordination
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio is providing civil design and surveying for this enhanced 14-mile high capacity bus project extending from the north end of downtown Portland, to Gresham’s Cleveland Park and Ride via the Division Street corridor. Emerio is responsible for designing public street improvements to meet acceptable bus layover bays along multiple sections of this corridor, as well as retrofitting the Cleveland Park & Ride into a layover facility for double-articulated buses. Emerio also provided design-level topographic survey along this corridor.

projects.Title: kōz on Yamhill
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Sanitary sewer design
Sidewalk design
Stormwater planter
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering for 30-micro-apartment units by KOZ Development, located in the historic Goose Hollow neighborhood. Our civil designers coordinated closely with multiple City of Portland bureaus, including Public Works Permitting for public sanitary sewer extension; BES for the design of private sewer lines and stormwater planter; and responded to PBOT's request to grade the public sidewalk along site frontage.

projects.Title: Eagle Landing
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Land use planning
Surveying
Preliminary site layout and design for master planning
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided land use planning, extensive surveying and preliminary site layout services for the land use approval process for this 17.7 acre property. Part of a larger 128-acre lifestyle community, Eagle Landing is a premier walkable urban environment in the economic heart of Portland metro’s east side with over 2.1 million square feet dedicated to a diverse mix of shopping, dining, office, entertainment, wellness, worship and home environments. The stately 96 acres surrounding the site have been thoughtfully developed to currently include a golf course, clubhouse and event facility, as well as walking paths and parks.

projects.Title: N. Denver: N. Lombard to N. Watts
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA ramp upgrades
Constructability reviews
Crosswalk design
Integrated bike lanes
Revised on-street parking
Roadway PS&E
Signing and striping
projects.DESCRIPTION: As the prime consultant, Emerio provided project management and roadway design services for this pavement rehabilitation project issued under Emerio’s current on-call contract for Street Design Services with PBOT. Mike Hohbach, Emerio’s project manager led Emerio’s design team and an MWESB certified subconsultant in developing 30%, 60%, 90% and final design for roadway PS&E construction documents.

projects.Title: SE Flavel St/ NE 102nd Ave/ SE 112th Ave
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Roadway PS&E
Crosswalk design
ADA ramp and driveway upgrades
Sidewalk infill
Signing and striping
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is the prime consultant for this sidewalk infill project along three corridors for this On-Call task order which is one of the first projects to be constructed under the Fixing Our Streets program. As a result, the new sidewalk network connects 2.25 miles of streets in East Portland with sidewalks on both sides of the street and provides safer access to schools, transit and work for neighborhood residents.

projects.Title: Highland Chevron
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA, parking lot, private streets and sidewalk design
Grading and erosion control design
Half street improvement
Stormwater treatment
Utility design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering services for this unique raise and rebuild project, resulting in an environmentally-friendly fueling station featuring solar energy, biodiesel, geothermal heating, electric car charging stations and a green roof. In close coordination with the planning and engineering departments of City of Beaverton, Emerio’s design team successfully solved project challenges, providing a sustainable design.

projects.Title: MLK Development
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site Design approved by City of Portland Bureau of Development Services
Grading design
On site stormwater management (infiltration planters)
Private utility design
ADA design of access to building
Striping and Signing plan
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio worked with a local architect to provide civil improvements associated with the re-development of an existing bank and construction of two additional retail buildings. Emerio performed civil engineering and land surveying services to re-design the parking lot and provide frontage improvements. After a storm drainage analysis was performed, stormwater was managed by converting a handful of parking stalls to infiltration planters. Emerio also prepared and obtained public works permits with the City for driveways, sidewalks, and ADA ramps.

projects.Title: SW Ventilation and Capacity Improvements
projects.OWNER: WSP (City of Portland Bureau of Environmental Services)
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site civil design
Sanitary sewer design
Grading design
Utility coordination
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Emerio provided civil design support on the project team to reduce sewer odors and increase the capacity of the Southwest Parallel Interceptor (SWPI) sewer system. Emerio’s task was to provide civil design, including grading and erosion control plans for the driveway and parking lot at the Ventilation Facility on the south side of SW Taylor’s Ferry Road, as well as design for the section of sewer pipeline extending from the facility to the adjacent manhole on SW Taylor’s Ferry Road.

projects.Title: N. Lombard Starbucks
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Land Use Planning
Site Design approved by City of Portland Bureau of Development Services
Grading design
On site stormwater management (infiltration planters)
Private utility design
ADA design of access to building
Parking lot and drive thru
Striping and Signing plan
ODOT coordination
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided project management, land use planning and civil engineering services for this private re-development of an existing car wash facility into a Starbucks drive-thru. Stormwater management was accomplished by onsite infiltration planters and final construction permitting was granted by the City of Portland. Located on a major urban corridor, US 30 bypass, a major challenge was gaining approval for the striping plan from both the City of Portland’s BOT and ODOT. Grading was designed with ADA access to the building in mind and stormwater was managed on site by infiltration planters.

projects.Title: Marquis Tualatin
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Land use planning
Site civil design
Grading and erosion control
Roadway, sidewalk, and ADA design
Utility design and coordination
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio Design managed this project, on a 12-acre site of the demolished Tualatin Grade School and redeveloped into an 80-unit assisted living/54-bed skilled nursing senior care facility with supporting living, dining, health and community facilities for residents. Emerio handled both the civil engineering and the land use planning, which was an extensive process requiring multiple approvals from several local jurisdictions. The public improvements included a half-street widening of SW Boones Ferry Road, a waterline extension, and extensive frontage improvements. The onsite improvements included a re-designed parking lot, on site stormwater management, utilities, frontage improvements, grading, erosion control, ADA improvements.

projects.Title: Fernhill Park
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Constructability reviews
Grading and erosion control plans
Potable waterline design
Sanitary and storm sewer design
Sidewalk and ADA ramps
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio is providing project management for this site civil project involving design and permitting for public works improvements and on-site civil improvements. Public works improvements include sidewalk and ADA ramps, and on-site improvements include underground utilities, portable waterline, and storm water report.

projects.Title: McKenna Terrace
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA, roadway, and sidewalk design
Grading and erosion control design
Land use planning
Land surveying
Stormwater management on-site
Sanitary and storm sewer conveyance design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided land development services for this 23-lot subdivision, including land use planning, survey, site civil design and construction support. For the site civil design, we provided the site layout and designed the underground utilities, roadway and on-site stormwater treatment facility.

projects.Title: Rockwood Rising
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA, parking lot, private streets and sidewalk design
Grading and erosion control design
Half street improvement
Stormwater/wastewater/potable water design
Surveying
UIC permitting
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering services for this 5.15 acre mixed use development which includes 3 parking lots, 3 mixed used residential and commercial buildings and a large community plaza area. This project is currently in design phases and is expected to start construction in late 2018. Emerio is the civil consultant working with architects, landscape architects and the city providing construction drawings and specifications.

projects.Title: Peach Tree Subdivision
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading and erosion control
Half-street improvements
Sanitary and storm sewer collection systems
Stormwater master planning
Stormwater treatment facility
Street design
Surveying
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil engineering and surveying for this 36-lot subdivision which has been successfully constructed. Nestled in the rolling hills near Happy Valley, grading and stormwater were major components for this subdivision. Close coordination with the City of Portland bureaus included BES for a sanitary sewer extension and PWB, for adding approximately 2000 feet of public water line and the design for a pressure reducing device located in the public right-of-way.

projects.Title: SK Northwest
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Street connections
Parking lot grading and design
On site stormwater management (infiltration planters)
Retaining wall design
Trail design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided civil improvements for this site along the east bank of the Willamette River near OMSI. Storm water quality was accomplished by the incorporation of two flow through planters situated on the building’s exterior wall. The City of Portland Presumptive Approach Calculator (PAC) was used to design this vegetated facility. Site grading consisted of two parking lots, a future offsite connection, building pad and retaining walls. A leg of the popular Springwater Trail was designed by Emerio Design. This design consisted of a twelve foot wide concrete bike/pedestrian path over the project length, calling for a sectional thickness to allow emergency vehicle access.

projects.Title: Renae Court
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
ADA, roadway, and sidewalk design
Grading and erosion control design
Land use planning
Land surveying
Stormwater management on-site
Sanitary and storm sewer conveyance design
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio provided land development services for this 18-lot subdivision, including land use planning, survey, site civil design and construction admin. For the site civil design, we provided the site layout and designed the underground utilities, roadway and on-site stormwater treatment facility.

projects.Title: River’s Edge
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Site civil design
Land use planning
Structural design
Survey
projects.DESCRIPTION: Land development for this 80-lot, high-density subdivision in King City, OR included design for the sewer, stormwater and potable water, along with roadway and sidewalk design. Significant challenges for this property included design of the storm water swale and the 1,350 feet of soft surface trail around the wetland area adjacent to the Tualatin River. Keeping sustainability in mind, the design of the bioswale terminated before entering the wetland area and clearing of trees and shrubs for the soft surface trail was kept to a minimum.

projects.Title: Westparc at North Bethany
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading design
Erosion control design
Stormwater/wastewater/potable water design
Parking lot and sidewalk design
Full street improvement
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio Design was the civil engineering consultant providing site civil design and construction engineering support for this 3-acre development. The project was successfully designed and constructed as a mixed-use residential, office and commercial development, including 149 apartment units and 11,000 square feet of commercial space. Emerio successfully delivered onsite and offsite construction drawings and specifications for grading, erosion control, stormwater, wastewater, potable water, parking lot, sidewalks and full street improvement.

projects.Title: Tryon Creek State Park
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED: On site stormwater management
projects.DESCRIPTION: Emerio was the prime consultant for this driving surface rehabilitation project. Due to the rehabilitation of impervious surfaces, a drainage treatment analysis requirement had to be met. Innovative and sustainable water quality methods were accomplished with no foreign infrastructure built in the park to treat water. Water quality treatment requirements were reached by utilizing pervious pavers, with drain rock storage underneath parking surfaces to allow for infiltration.
